title: Repealed by Acts 2003, No. 1001, §1, eff. July 2, 2003.
doc_html:
§1559.  Repealed by Acts 2003, No. 1001, §1, eff. July 2, 2003.

NOTE:  See Acts 2003, No. 1001, §2, relative to effectiveness and applicability of repeal of R.S. 33:1559.
